title: Fuzzy Match Search

posts.author: evernon9 (Erica Vernon)
posts.cookedHtml: I think Monday’s integrated search feature could use some work. It seems that you have to type in the exact text string to get the items that match to populate in the search results. It would be more helpful if it was more of a fuzzy match so that results can still be given if the search bar is missing say an apostrophe. It may make the most sense to allow this to be turned on or off during a search since you may also want to search a phone number and see only that exact result.
